description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a rich, cognac-brown leather with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The sofa features two large, loose seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which are uniform in size and shape, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The armrests are gently flared outward and are the same height as the backrest, creating a sleek, contemporary silhouette. The sofa sits on four slender, black metal legs, which are positioned at the corners and provide a sense of lightness and elevation. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, with a subtle seam running vertically down the center. This piece would be well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or stylish outdoor patios.
description: A modern, cognac-brown leather two-seater sofa with flared armrests, plush cushions, and slender black metal legs. Its sleek, contemporary design is both inviting and stylish.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, flared armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the outward flare of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel with a central seam and the slim black legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion profile seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all uniform in size and placed side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Flared armrests, same height as the backrest, straight profile with subtle outward angle, fully padded and upholstered in matching leather.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners, straight and exposed, providing elevation and a modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose back cushions; continuous and unsegmented structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid cognac-brown leather with a smooth, slightly glossy texture and minimal visible stitching.
